scripts.build: npm run sprites && rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp index.html game.js dist/ && cp -R assets dist/assets
scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check game.js && node --check functions/api/leaderboard.js && node --check functions/api/run.js
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name novawing
